name: ColabDock
description: Protein protein docking given their protein pdb structure files. Incorporate 1v1, 1vN, or MvN experimental restraints to dock to a known binding site.
capabilities: Protein protein docking given their protein pdb structure files
Incorporate 1v1, 1vN, or MvN experimental restraints to dock to a known binding site

protein_a.description: First protein structure in PDB format

protein_b.description: Second protein structure in PDB format

restraint_type.description: Type of experimental restraints to incorporate

restraints.description: Experimental restraints specifying residue pairs or interface regions
